expectations.text: Explains SSL errors are often transient, not necessarily fatal
expectations.evidence: Line 5: "Not necessarily. SSL errors from colab exec are often a proxy/network issue, not a sign that the session or your background process (PID 903) has died."

expectations.text: Shows how to verify session with colab sessions / colab status

expectations.text: Mentions the background PID (903) may still be alive despite SSL errors
expectations.evidence: Line 5: background process not dead; Line 32: "training process (PID 903) is likely still alive"

expectations.text: Mentions ~2-4 hour session lifetime and silent termination
expectations.evidence: Line 67: "Free tier GPU sessions auto-terminate after ~2-4 hours"

expectations.text: Shows recovery: new session → re-upload → resume from checkpoints

expectations.text: Advises downloading checkpoints before session dies: colab download
